3100170.name: BIOPUNCH Arena
3100170.description:
BIOPUNCH is a first-person retro brawler game with a harsh edge. Taking place in a dystopian future, you play as Bannon, a mutant pugilist taking on the corporation of thugs and organ harvesters that kidnapped his family. Punch a path through throngs of enemies with your rocket-powered arms in wave after brutal wave, and remember that as tough as you are, you are not invincible… a single slip up will get you cut down real quick in this no-holds-barred fight for your family's survival.

A key feature of the full release will be its six-punch fighting system, where specific punches may be used to disable enemies by their weak points or finish off a staggered foe. The full release will also feature pugilism, gunplay, challenging enemy variants, minibosses, bosses, arena and campaign modes, and multiple playable characters.
